description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: test-nixos and build. The test-nixos job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the repository, installs Nix, and runs tests in a nix-shell. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with multiple Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs pytest, and performs various security audits and code checks.
